_readme: Spawn classification, maintained BY HAND. Maps the tokens on each spawn-points.json point to real values; Build-AIBandits.ps1 composes a group per point at prestart. categories: a point's 'category' -> a template name that MUST exist in common/DynamicAIB.common.json groupTemplates. sizes: a point's OPTIONAL 'size' letter -> member-count override (omit to use the template's default count; add DENSITY by adding more points). maps: the point's 'map' letter -> mission folder. A point with NO category becomes a base 'holdout' group. Snipers use the per-map snipers[] spec, NOT this file. Edit spawn-points.json itself in the ConfigViewer Map tab (Edit mode) or by hand; this file only defines the token vocabulary. (VPP is deprecated: the old importer/migrator is archived under deprecated/, not part of the deploy.)
